payload.long_description: Close-up of a ceiling-mounted fan with brown wooden blades and a central frosted glass light globe; the unit is partially cut off by the crop (blade edges and housing visible) and shot from a low angled perspective, with slight motion blur on the blades, approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.
